title: citrus pubinervia
intro: Citrus pubinervia, also known as the Australian round lime or cedar leaf lime, is a species of citrus fruit that is native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to have various medicinal benefits, including reducing fever and relieving digestive issues. The health benefits of Citrus pubinervia include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and anti-inflammatory agent. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, extracts, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
